PowerShell($inPath = "$env:TEMP\\eas-build.gz"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($inPath\); Write-Host "First 4 bytes \(hex\):"; $bytes[0..3] | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.ToString\("X2"\) -NoNewline; Write-Host " " -NoNewline }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "First 200 chars as string:"; [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes, 0, [Math]::Min\(200, $bytes.Length\)\))
